name: Minecraft [Alt Anomaly POV]
description:
Requested By this Handsome Fella!

I made this via tweaking the other Minecraft Bot, ill say this'll be a alternate version.

Feel free to request literally anything RPG wise.

I also had to cut off some of the stuff in the personality tab since it kept introducing characters that shouldn't be there.

(sorry if you were a fan of the players, they are no more, gone to the shadow realm.)

(HOLY SHIT I JUST FOUND OUT I'VE BEEN SPELLING HEROBRINE HEROBINE IM A DUMBASS)
